form.formComment: Last start by a head (Sr1) at Narrabri (2:10.80) beating Spooky Art in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $6.50 at the bell was 5th-8.8. The ace draw gives her the chance to win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a head (Sr1) at Narrabri (2:10.80) beating Spooky Art in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $6.50 at the bell was 5th-8.8. The ace draw gives her the chance to win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the home turn and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 5th (Sr1) over 1760m at Narrabri, at the bell was 7th-10.9 beaten 11 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $23. Showed ability the run before when she won by 8 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Narrabri (2:10.50) beating Lookat Mee in NR up to 35 on April 5 at $3.90. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Gotonebettor at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $26. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Sparkling Sue at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR up to 45 on April 12 at $3. Draws well and could go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped clear of interference at the 700m.
Raced ungenerously during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 5th (Sr1) over 1760m at Narrabri was 9th-11.3 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Katastrophee (2:08.90) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $7. Showed ability the run before when he won by 1.5 m (Fr3) at Narrabri (2:10.70) beating Johnny Dee in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $5.50. Can play a role in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped after the start, checking You Cannot Hide.

form.formComment: Began her campaign last start running 10th (Fr3) over 1980m at this track beaten 40 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $101. Might need more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Began her campaign last start running 10th (Fr3) over 1980m at this track beaten 40 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $101. Might need more time.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle was 6th-12.95 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Peppi Gratz (1:56.80) in NR 40 to 43 on April 6 at $26. Showed ability the race before when he posted a big 4 m win after showing early speed, (Fr5) at this track (1:58.60) beating Country Major in NR 35 to 38 on March 26 at $4.60 at the bell was leading 2.85. Good showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over race in the early and middle stages of the event.
Raced in restricted room in the early part of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr2) over 1760m at Narrabri beaten 21 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $8. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at Narrabri, beaten 2.25 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $2.20. Could bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr3) over 1760m at Narrabri, beaten 20 m by Katastrophee (2:08.90) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $6.50. Before that, 8th (Fr1) over 2160m after showing early speed at Narrabri beaten 35 m by Cut Glass (2:39.30) in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $5. Can do better.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 4.5 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Gotonebettor at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Katastrophee at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR up to 45 on April 12 at $2.80. Winning claims with even luck.
